table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 14px; table-layout: fixed;

td.style: padding: 4px 6px; width: 15%; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.t-attf-style: font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; color: #{style.theme_color or '#2c3e50'}; margin-bottom: 8px;

div.style: margin-top: 20px; padding: 8px; border-left: 3px solid #ddd; clear: both;

table.t-attf-style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 30px; border: 1px solid #{style.theme_color or '#2c3e50'};

td.t-attf-style: border: 1px solid #{style.theme_color or '#2c3e50'}; padding: 4px; text-align: center; font-size: 9px;
border: 1px solid #{style.theme_color or '#2c3e50'}; padding: 4px; text-align: center; font-size: 9px;
border: 1px solid #{style.theme_color or '#2c3e50'}; padding: 4px; text-align: center; font-size: 9px;
border: 1px solid #{style.theme_color or '#2c3e50'}; padding: 4px; text-align: center; font-size: 9px;
